message:
fix(test): correct star badge test selector in tldr.spec.ts

The previous regex 'text=/\d+,?\d* stars?|★/' didn't match actual content
because star counts are displayed as numbers only (e.g., "1,400") without
"stars" label, and the Star icon is SVG not text character.

Now uses class selector for amber badge and verifies it contains a number.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
